calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James M. Millar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Little Stud, Inc.
Byron Yee, Manager for Little Stud, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Matty Hanon, a/k/a Matthew Hanon.
Default was entered against defendant March 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Little Stud, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Matty Hanon, a/k/a Matthew Hanon as follows:

Damages/Principal - $54,934.00.
Interest - $4,515.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $59,874.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
